## Entities.Converters.Fillings.procedures variable

Converter for filling recipe procedures with preferred selection. Validates that preferredId (if specified) exists in options.

**Signature:**

```typescript
procedures: Converter<Model.IOptionsWithPreferred<IProcedureRef, ProcedureId>>
```
